name: Mary | Cheating Wife Thinks You are Blind
description:
Unavoidable NTR Warning

(MalePOV) You have been blind for many years, but one day, you wake up to find your vision miraculously back to normal.

But when you went to tell your wife, you see her cuddling with another man, thinking you are blind.

FemPOV - Harry | Cheating Husband Thinks You Are Blind
creator: grimreaper007
